{{Quote|Hutt cuisine is somewhat casual, with bowls of the above brought in and devoured in random order amid a spray of drool. Utensils are optional. I would recommend gloves, however.|Ebenn Q3 Baobab, writing about mubasa hock and other Hutt delicacies in ''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide''|<ref name="GPBATG" />}}
'''Mubasa hock''', named '''''mubasa hok''''' in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], was an expensive dish created by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It was served in the [[Odacer-Faustin Sith academy|Sith Academy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Odacer-Faustin]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3645 BBY]] and was also available in Hutt [[Restaurant/Legends|eateries]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
Mubasa hock was an expensive dish that was edible to both the [[Human/Legends|Human]] and [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the latter calling it ''mubasa hok'' in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] and often serving it in a bowl alongside several other dishes, all of which would be eaten in a random order.<ref name="GPBATG" /> It could be served as a stringy lump and could be eaten alongside canned [[montra fruit]].<ref name="RH" /> Using utensils to eat the hock was optional.<ref name="GPBATG" />

==History==
Mubasa hock was served in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as early as<ref name="RH" /> [[3645 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> when the [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith Acolyte]] [[Jura Ostrogoth]] ate a portion of hock while in the dining hall of the [[Odacer-Faustin Sith academy|Sith Academy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Odacer-Faustin]].<ref name="RH" /> During the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] scholar [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] recommended that [[Gender/Legends|his]] Human readership of his publication ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]'' try mubasa hock—albeit while wearing [[Glove/Legends|gloves]]—should they find themselves in any of the Huttese eateries of the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Baobab mentioned the dish as one of his favorite Hutt cuisines in the section of the book dedicated to the Huttese [[Language/Legends|language]], where he also provided the translation from [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and described all Huttese cuisine as "casual."<ref name="GPBATG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mubasa hock was first mentioned in the [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], written by ''[[Star Wars]]'' sound designer [[Ben Burtt]] in [[2001]].<ref name="GPBATG" /> It later appeared in the [[2010]] novel [[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']], written by [[Joe Schreiber]].<ref name="RH" /> No explicit connection exists between mubasa hock and [[mubasa sauce]], which appeared in the [[2009]] novel ''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]''.<ref name="RF">''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]''</ref>
